findings.title: Missing signer validation
findings.message: Instruction `initialize_vault` appears to mutate state but its accounts struct has no Signer or `signer = true` constraint.
findings.fix_hint: Add `Signer<'info>` to the accounts struct or constrain the authority with `signer = true`.

findings.title: Unsafe account close pattern
findings.message: Manual lamport/account mutation detected without Anchor `close =` constraint nearby.
findings.fix_hint: Use `#[account(close = destination)]` so rent and lamports are handled safely.

findings.title: Unvalidated CPI target
findings.message: Cross-program invocation detected without nearby typed Program or explicit program ID validation.
findings.fix_hint: Pass `Program<'info, TargetProgram>` in accounts or verify `program.key() == target_program::ID`.

findings.title: Program unchecked in remaining accounts
findings.message: remaining_accounts iteration without per-account validation is risky.
findings.fix_hint: Validate owner, discriminator, and signer for each remaining account.

findings.title: Unchecked arithmetic
findings.message: Arithmetic on balance/amount without checked_* operations.
findings.fix_hint: Use checked_add/checked_sub/checked_mul and handle None on overflow.

findings.title: Unchecked arithmetic
findings.message: Arithmetic on balance/amount without checked_* operations.
findings.fix_hint: Use checked_add/checked_sub/checked_mul and handle None on overflow.

findings.title: Pubkey default / zero key
findings.message: Default pubkey used — verify intent.
findings.fix_hint: Avoid Pubkey::default(); use explicit constants and validate against expected keys.

findings.title: PDA seeds missing bump validation
findings.message: PDA `seeds = [...]` constraint found without canonical bump validation.
findings.fix_hint: Add `bump` to the accounts constraint or include `&[bump]` in seeds and store canonical bump.

findings.title: Unchecked AccountInfo usage
findings.message: Raw AccountInfo used without typed wrapper or documented /// CHECK justification.
findings.fix_hint: Prefer Account<T>, InterfaceAccount<T>, or add /// CHECK with explicit in-handler validation.

   103 |     #[account(mut)]

   106 | }

findings.title: Missing authority constraint

findings.fix_hint: Use `has_one = authority` or typed Signer/Account relations to bind authorities.

findings.title: Untyped sysvar account
findings.message: Sysvar passed as raw AccountInfo instead of typed Sysvar<T>.
findings.fix_hint: Use `Sysvar<'info, Rent>` or the relevant typed sysvar wrapper.

findings.title: Unbounded Vec in accounts
findings.message: Unbounded Vec in accounts may cause compute DoS — prefer max_len.
findings.fix_hint: Use #[max_len(N)] on Vec account fields.

findings.fix_hint: Add #[account] above the struct so Anchor assigns an 8-byte discriminator.
